title: Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion
author: Robert Cialdini
content: “We use mental shortcuts to make decisions; once you understand them, you can trigger them in others.”
action: Map heuristics to predict and guide outcomes.

title: The Psychopath Test
author: Jon Ronson
content: “The world is shaped by people who lack the emotional inhibition that stops the rest of us.”
action: Identify uninhibited actors as agents of change.

title: Predictably Irrational
author: Dan Ariely
content: “Humans are not rational; they are consistently irrational in predictable ways.”
action: Build strategies on human bias, not logic.

title: The Lucifer Effect
author: Philip Zimbardo
content: “The situation is a more powerful determinant of behavior than the individual personality.”
action: Change the environment to adjust behavior.

title: Influence and Power
author: John French & Bertram Raven
content: “Power is not a static quantity, but a relationship based on resources, legitimacy, and expertise.”
action: Diversify your power base across all three pillars.
